$schema_note: Canonical pointer to where the build is. Re-derive context from this + blackboard files; do not scroll chat history.

project.tagline: Mission control for a swarm of CLI coding agents: calm surface, swarming depth. Parallel CLI-agent orchestration over isolated git worktrees — cross-platform, self-hosted, OSS.
project._prior_art_internal: prior-art parallel-agent orchestrator; provenance URL + rationale recorded in DECISIONS.md (ADR-0020) and docs/recon.md

HEAD 98b44b2. Prediction fafdb388 = hit.)

next_release_target: shipped — v1.0.0 is the FINAL release (all §9 exit conditions met with evidence)

stack_decision.db: PGlite (embedded Postgres, WASM) via Drizzle ORM; real Postgres optional
stack_decision.sync: self-hosted WebSocket + PGlite-backed append-only event log + resume tokens
stack_decision.pty: @homebridge/node-pty-prebuilt-multiarch (ConPTY on Windows; prebuilds win/mac/linux incl Node24 ABI, no compiler) — VALIDATED ADR-0007a; PTY layer/host engine runs under NODE not Bun (Bun tears down ConPTY net.Socket on Windows); tree-kill verified killing process trees
stack_decision.mobile: PWA-first (service worker, Web Push/VAPID); Capacitor optional/deferred

next_actions: [ACTIVE — CONTINUE LOOP to launch: green CI + GitHub Pages hosting; full plan in LAUNCH-HANDOFF.md] The landing page apps/site is built + verified + §6.3-Critic-ALL-PASS at code commit 98b44b2 (3-OS CI green run 27639550916). REMAINING: (1) CI is RED on HEAD af7fefd — a Windows typecheck FLAKE (ADR-0011 class: same code green on 98b44b2 + mac/ubuntu; tsc exited ~0.5s, no `error TS`); a re-run of run 27639883568's failed job was triggered — confirm green, and if the flake recurs make it durable (cap `turbo run typecheck --concurrency=2`, like the test step). (2) HOST on GitHub Pages (not enabled yet — 404): set Vite `base:'/grove/'` (project Pages subpath), add .github/workflows/pages.yml (actions/upload-pages-artifact + deploy-pages; permissions pages:write+id-token:write; environment github-pages), enable Pages, verify the LIVE URL https://ghostlygawd.github.io/grove/ renders (all assets at base, OG absolute URL, .nojekyll), make install commands honest (source `git clone github.com/GhostlyGawd/grove && grove up` is real; brew/winget/grove.dev pending). Record ADR-0022. Loop done when CI green on HEAD AND the site is live + independently verified. See LAUNCH-HANDOFF.md.
